Honest Ingredients

Four signatures, crafted daily.

Each bowl is built from scratch with ingredients sourced that morning. Choose your favorite — or find a new one.

Garden Salmon Bowl

Fresh greens, salmon sashimi, and avocado on a bed of rice.

Beef Balance Bowl

Glazed beef, soft eggs, and roasted vegetables with hummus.

Smoky Beef Bowl

Grilled beef, yellow rice, seasonal greens and pickled sides.

Teriyaki Chicken Bowl

Glazed chicken with lotus root, jalapeño, and vibrant toppings.
